_comment: Scripted interview personas. `story` is turn 1; `answers` reply to direct questions by field; `corrections` override one confirm_card (then accept). gold.fields uses exact match for enums/bools/dates and case-insensitive containment for free-text (product/seller/grievance). Scope-gate personas end at the gate: gold.scope_gate_failure lists words the explanation must contain. NOTE: terms_source is deliberately NOT in gold.fields — it is a UI-action field set by the paste/no-terms controls via stateDelta (see backend/schemas.py and _NO_CONFIRM_FIELDS in intake.py), never extracted from free text, so asserting the model infers it here would mis-test the design. The real terms flow is covered by the e2e suite.

personas.story: Hi — I bought a Sonos Era 100 speaker from the CurrysOnline website on my personal credit card and it arrived on 10 June 2026. It was dead on arrival, completely silent, won't even pair. I just want my money back. Nobody has tried to repair anything, it's been sat in its box.

answers.terms_source: I have pasted the seller's terms and conditions into the tool.
answers.grievance: Dead on arrival — completely silent and will not pair.
It leaks from the base and trips the fuse.
answers.terms_source: I have pasted the seller's terms into the tool.

personas.story: I ordered a pair of Meindl hiking boots from TrailOutfitters, delivered 20 June 2026, and the sole is already peeling off the left boot. Paid by debit card. I'd like a replacement pair. No repair has been attempted.

answers.terms_source: I have pasted the seller's terms and conditions into the tool.
answers.grievance: The sole is peeling off the left boot.

personas.story: My company ordered a logo design service from a freelancer last month for our rebrand and what they delivered is rubbish. I want the fee back.
I bought a jumper in a shop in town three weeks ago, tried it on again at home and just don't like the colour on me. Nothing wrong with it. Can I force them to refund me?

answers.grievance: I changed my mind about the colour — there is no fault.
